Home / Contact

Contact Us

Have feedback, a tool suggestion, or a question? We'd love to hear from you.

Send us a message

Email us directly at the address below. We typically respond within 2–3 business days.

hello@jaldi-docs.example

Note: Replace this email with your real contact address before going live.

Tool suggestions

Is there a document or image tool you wish JaldiDocs had? Let us know and we'll consider adding it.

Bug reports

If a tool isn't working correctly on your device or browser, please describe the issue and your device/browser details.

Privacy questions

Questions about how your data is handled? Read our Privacy Policy first, then write to us if you have more questions.

Partnerships

Interested in partnering, sponsoring, or collaborating with JaldiDocs? Reach out with details about your proposal.

JaldiDocs

Free PDF, image and document tools for India. Fast, private and free.

Files processed locally in your browser. Nothing uploaded.

PDF Tools

  • JPG to PDF
  • Merge PDF
  • PDF Compressor

Image Tools

  • Image Resize
  • Image Compress
  • Passport Photo
  • Signature Resize

Business Tools

  • Invoice Maker
  • Rent Receipt

Student Tools

  • Aadhaar Photo Resize
  • PAN Card Photo

All tools are free and browser-based. No signup required.
